calendar.matters: ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: Accounting #1
Joint Petition To Approve Settlement And Consent Of Contingent Beneficiaries

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Filing Petition To Approve Settlement
Off Calendar May-11-2026 Off Calendar

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: Accounting #1
Off Calendar May-11-2026 Continued To Aug-24-26 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Filing Petition To Approve Settlement
Off Calendar Mar-09-2026 Continued To May-11-26 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: Accounting #1
Off Calendar Mar-09-2026 Continued To May-11-26 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: Accounting #1
Off Calendar Jan-05-2026 Continued To Mar-09-26 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Amanda Ebey for objector Sofia Nicklas (via Zoom).

The matter was called for hearing on First Account of Administrator.

Ms. Ebey reported that mediation had occurred and was successful, and that she had prepared a petition to approve settlement. She stated that the contingent remaindermen had signed disclaimers but had indicated that they wished to have an attorney review the settlement documents. Ms. Ebey further stated that she had not received confirmation as to whether the remaindermen had retained counsel.

Following discussion, the Court continued the matter to March 9, 2026, at 9:00 a.m. in Department 204, and set a status hearing regarding the filing of the petition to approve settlement to occur on the same date.

Judge: Ross C. Moody; Clerk: Kenneth B. Hunt; Not reported (D204)

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: Accounting #1
Off Calendar Nov-10-2025 Continued To Jan-05-26 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: Accounting #1
Off Calendar Jul-28-2025 Continued To Nov-10-25 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances (via Zoom videoconference):
Robert Sellards, Esq., for Nick Nicklas, Petitioner.
Amanda Ebey, Esq., for Sofia Nicklas, Objector.

At the court's query, counsel presented oral argument to support their positions regarding the status of the estate. There is discussion regarding the likelihood of the parties participating in the court's pro bono mediation however, the estate's value will not allow the preceding. The court advises that it intends to issue a Breslin order. No opposition to the court's intention is presented. Accordingly, a continuance date to allow the parties to mediate is discussed and confirmed. The Accounting Petition is continued to Nov-10-2025 at 9:00 a.m. in Dept. 204. The court advises that the Breslin order shall include instructions that the parties are to mediate by Oct-27-2025 pursuant to the continued date. The Report of Status of Administration is taken off calendar as moot.

Judge: Hon. Ross C. Moody. Clerk: Robert Woods. Not Reported.

REPORT OF STATUS OF ADMINISTRATION
Off Calendar Mar-17-2025 Continued To May-19-25 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Robert M. Sellards for Nick Nicklas, Petitioner (via Zoom).
Amanda L. Ebey for and with Sophia Nicklas, Objector (via Zoom).

The court inquired about the status of the matter. Mr. Sellards stated that the first accounting was filed the previous Friday but had not yet been processed through e-filing. He requested 60 days to file a petition for final distribution. Ms. Ebey raised no objection to Mr. Sellards request for a 60-day continuance.

The court continued the matter to May 19, 2025, at 9:00 a.m. in Department 204.

Judge: Ronald E. Quidachay; Clerk: Kenneth B. Hunt; Not reported (D204)

REPORT OF STATUS OF ADMINISTRATION
Off Calendar Jan-13-2025 Continued To Mar-17-25 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Robert M. Sellards for Nick Nicklas, Petitioner (via Zoom).
Amanda Ebey for Sofia Nicklas, Objector/Beneficiary (via Zoom).

Ms. Ebey requested a full accounting of the estate from the date of death due to concerns over rental property income and expenses. Mr. Sellards acknowledged delays in the administration but stated the accounting is in progress and requested 90 days to ensure completion.

The court continued the matter to March 17, 2025, at 9:00 a.m. in Department 204, for submission of the final accounting. Mr. Sellards was instructed to provide the requested accounting to Ms. Ebey prior to the hearing date.

Judge: Ronald E. Quidachay; Clerk: Kenneth B. Hunt; Not reported (D204)

REPORT OF STATUS OF ADMINISTRATION
Off Calendar Dec-16-2024 Continued To Jan-13-25 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of Estate
Off Calendar Oct-22-2024 Off Calendar

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of Estate
Off Calendar Oct-01-2024 Continued To Oct-22-24 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Luis Molina specially appearing for Attorney Robert Sellards on behalf of Nick Nicklas.

Mr. Molina stated that the inventory and appraisal was submitted to the probate referee last week and that Mr. Sellards is requesting a three-week continuance to file the status report. Mr. Molina also explained that Mr. Sellards had some health issues, and that the personal representative was out of the country. Status on close of estate is continued to October 22, 2024, at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. All of the documents are to be filed by then.

Judge: Stephen M. Murphy. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: Gutierrez. Not reported.

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of Estate
Off Calendar Sep-03-2024 Continued To Oct-01-24 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Robert Stellars appeared by zoom for petitioner.

The court stated that there is no inventory and appraisal, and no petition for approval of a report on status of administration. Mr. Stellars stated that it is his fault, that he had some health issues, that they had to track down some information regarding the stock holdings, and that he has the information, and he can now file the inventory and appraisal, and a petition. Status on close of estate is continued to October 1, 2024, at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Stephen M. Murphy. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: K. Lopez. Not reported.

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of Estate
Off Calendar Aug-06-2024 Continued To Sep-03-24 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION WITH WILL ANNEXED
Off Calendar Jun-26-2023 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

This matter was set for hearing with no appearance required for the purpose of admitting the lost will. No one appeared to object. There being no objections, the Court granted the Petition for Letters of Administration With Will Annexed. The lost will dated Feb-23-2000 is admitted to probate. Nick Nicklas is appointed Administrator of the estate with full authority. Bond is set at $4,229,000. Order for the same signed in open Court. Status on close of estate is set for Aug-06-2024 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. If a petition for final distribution or a petition for approval of report on status of administration is filed two weeks prior, the status hearing will be taken off calendar.

Judge: Hon. Ross C. Moody. Clerk: Robert Woods. Deputy: Choi. Not Reported.
